title: DPATriage
description: Schema for triaging and validating Data Processing Agreements (DPAs) or custom privacy terms.

productOrService.description: The specific SaaS product or service covered by this DPA.

role.description: The role of the SaaS company under GDPR/CCPA for this processing activity.

dataSubjects.description: The categories of data subjects (e.g. employees, customers, patients, end-users).

personalDataCategories.description: Categories of personal data processed (e.g. name, email, IP address, user logs).

specialCategoryData.description: Special categories of data / sensitive data under GDPR Art. 9 (e.g. biometric, health, genetic, sexual orientation).

subprocessors.description: List of sub-processors who will process the personal data under this contract.

transferLocations.description: Geographical locations where data will be stored or processed (e.g. US, EU, Germany).

retentionPeriod.description: The period for which the personal data is retained (e.g. 'Term of Agreement + 30 days').

deletionProcess.description: The mechanism and SLA for deleting data upon contract termination (e.g. 'Within 30 days upon request, certified').

securityAnnexStatus.description: The status or reference to the Technical and Organizational Security Measures (TOMs).

customerRequestedChanges.description: Key deviations or edits requested by the customer in their DPA mark-up.

missingFacts.description: Any missing information needed to complete the triage (e.g. missing list of subprocessors).
